subcodes.first_line: All praise be to God, and blessings and peace be upon His Prophets who faithfully took what was commanded them from His presence. Verily, He is [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله و الصلوه و السلام علی انبیائه الذین اخذوا ما امروا به من لدنه انه هو
subcodes.subjects: @the power of words; of speech, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
